goal: Remove the circular dependency between the real-adapter evidence bundle verifier and v0 release readiness, then make v0 release readiness require a GO real-adapter evidence bundle. The bundle verifier should validate endpoint/intake/RC-gate/M6 evidence only; v0 readiness should own the final release-ready decision and require the bundle verifier report to be GO.
head: 755b1a5
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may refactor the evidence bundle verifier/readiness verifier/tests/evidence and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Bundle verifier no longer depends on v0 readiness
v0 readiness requires GO real_adapter_evidence_bundle_verification for release GO
Tests cover GO readiness requiring bundle GO and current NOT_GO bundle blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate changes release evidence verification only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped non-circular bundle gate integration after finding that the bundle verifier required v0 readiness while v0 readiness did not require the bundle verifier. The intended ownership is bundle verifier for endpoint/intake/RC/M6 evidence, and v0 readiness for final release state.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, bundle verifier, v0 readiness auditor, focused tests, bundle verification JSON, and readiness JSON. The previous bundle verifier included v0 readiness in the bundle check, which made v0 readiness ownership ambiguous if readiness also required bundle GO.
phase_notes.build: Removed v0 readiness dependency from scripts/verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py. Added real_adapter_evidence_bundle_verification as a release-required check in scripts/verify_v0_release_readiness.py, mapping current missing real-adapter bundle blockers to real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint while treating a missing/invalid bundle report as unexpected.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused bundle/readiness pytest, current bundle verification expected NOT_GO, generated bundle JSON validation, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, readiness JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Non-circular v0 bundle gate integration is complete. Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with the sole acceptable blocker real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint, and release GO now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE.

pabcd.approved_scope: Bundle verifier/readiness verifier/tests/evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim from current local artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
